name: Afena
description_short: Afena Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative in Grant County, Indiana, offering personal banking, loans, and savings products with competitive rates and community-focused service.
description_long:
Afena Federal Credit Union has been serving Grant County, Indiana for 68 years as a member-owned financial institution. The credit union operates as a traditional banking alternative, providing members with access to checking accounts, savings products, and various loan options. Unlike profit-driven banks, credit unions like Afena are structured as cooperatives where members are owners, theoretically resulting in better rates and member-focused service.

Afena's service offerings include personal checking and savings accounts (including their Secure Plus Checking with up to 2.25% APY), certificate of deposit products, auto loans (from 6.69% APR), personal loans (from 9.49% APR), home equity loans, and emergency lending products. They also offer Afena Fast Cash for members seeking quick access to up to $2,000, and a Bridge the Gap Loan (partnership with Community Foundation of Grant County) as an alternative to payday lending, capped at $2,000. The credit union provides digital banking capabilities, bill payment services, and financial literacy resources through Banzai, a free online financial education tool.

Afena distinguishes itself through its community partnerships, member testimonials emphasizing personal relationship-based service, and commitment to alternative lending solutions. The Bridge the Gap Loan partnership explicitly positions them against predatory payday lending. Their messaging emphasizes listening to members' financial stories without judgment and member-focused decision-making. The 68th Annual Meeting announcement and invitation-to-all-members approach reflects cooperative governance transparency.

As a credit union, Afena is deposit-insured through the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) equivalent to FDIC insurance. However, availability is geographically limited to Grant County, Indiana members or those meeting specific membership criteria. Loan rates shown (6.69%-9.49% APR) are competitive but positioned as promotional rates, suggesting actual rates may vary by applicant. The website provides minimal detail on membership eligibility requirements, approval timelines, or fee structures.
services: Personal checking accounts (Secure Plus Checking with 2.25% APY)
Savings accounts and Certificate of Deposit products (12-month shares at 3.87% APY)
Home equity loans for debt consolidation and home improvements
Afena Fast Cash emergency lending (up to $2,000 for established members)
Bridge the Gap Loan (up to $2,000, payday alternative partnership)
Digital banking platform with bill pay and account management
Online loan refinancing for external loans
Member account login and enrollment services
Annual member meetings and governance participation
pros: Secure Plus Checking offers competitive 2.25% APY with built-in identity theft protection and cell phone coverage
Bridge the Gap Loan partnership provides payday lending alternative capped at $2,000 with transparent community partnership
Afena Fast Cash provides established members instant access to up to $2,000 for emergencies
Auto loan rates starting at 6.69% APR are competitive for credit union lending
Free Banzai financial literacy platform available to all members for personal finance education
Member-owned cooperative structure emphasizes non-profit, member-benefit focus rather than shareholder returns
Community presence with physical location at Ivy Tech College, Marion for accessibility
cons: Geographic limitation to Grant County, Indiana restricts membership availability for most consumers
Personal loan rates starting at 9.49% APR are higher than some competing lenders despite credit union positioning
Website lacks transparency on membership eligibility requirements, application process timelines, and fee schedules
Limited detail on credit score requirements, debt-to-income thresholds, or approval criteria for loan products
No mention of online account opening or remote membership application—may require in-person visit
best_for: Grant County, Indiana residents seeking relationship-based banking with community credit union service
Consumers looking for payday loan alternatives through the Bridge the Gap Loan program
Members seeking high-yield checking (2.25% APY) with integrated identity theft protection
Auto loan borrowers with established credit willing to work with a local cooperative lender
diagnosis: Afena Federal Credit Union is best for Grant County, Indiana residents who prioritize relationship-based, member-owned banking over national bank convenience and want competitive rates on savings and loans. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership limitation—the credit union does not appear to serve members outside Grant County, Indiana, making it inaccessible to most consumers despite its competitive product offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
